subject: exterior wall
sourceText: Exterior walls shall have a minimum thickness of 0.3 m.

subject: exterior wall
sourceText: Exterior walls shall have a height of at least 3.0 m.

subject: interior partition wall
sourceText: Interior partition walls shall not exceed 0.15 m in thickness.

subject: floor slab
sourceText: Floor slabs shall have a thickness of at least 0.2 m.

subject: floor-to-ceiling
sourceText: The clear floor-to-ceiling height shall be between 2.7 m and 3.6 m.

subject: column
sourceText: Structural columns shall be spaced no more than 6.0 m apart, centre to centre.

subject: column
sourceText: Each column shall have a minimum cross-sectional width of 0.4 m.
